creator: tomasz.sowinski@nucleus.malbork.pl
text:
Good morning guys 

One week back I have observed that I can not build port mentioned in the summary.

My freebsd vesion:

root@dns:/usr/ports/dns/unbound # uname -a
FreeBSD dns.nucleus.malbork.pl 13.0-STABLE FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #33 stable/13-n249136-c595625abe8: Mon Jan 24 20:52:23 CET 2022     root@host.nucleus.malbork.pl:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/NUCLEUS  amd64

Error that I get during port patching

root@dns:/usr/ports/dns/unbound # make clean install
===>  Cleaning for unbound-1.14.0
===>  License BSD3CLAUSE accepted by the user
===>   unbound-1.14.0 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by unbound-1.14.0 for building
===>  Extracting for unbound-1.14.0
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for unbound-1.14.0.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for unbound-1.14.0
/bin/cat /var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/dns/unbound/work/unbound-1.14.0/contrib/aaaa-filter-iterator.patch | /usr/bin/patch -d /var/ports/basejail/usr/ports/dns/unbound/work/unbound-1.14.0 -p1 -s
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to iterator/iter_utils.c.rej
1 out of 3 hunks failed--saving rejects to util/configparser.y.rej
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /basejail/usr/ports/dns/unbound
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /basejail/usr/ports/dns/unbound
root@dns:/usr/ports/dns/unbound #
